name: Mio Chunks Adult Cat Beef 400g
description: Product Features Rich in Beef : High-quality chunks of beef as the primary ingredient. Complete & Balanced : Formulated to support adult cats' overall health and well-being. Tasty & Tender : Soft, flavorful chunks in a savory gravy for a meal your cat will love. Essential Nutrients : Contains vitamins and minerals to support a healthy coat, strong muscles, and a robust immune system. No Artificial Additives : Free from preservatives, artificial colors, and flavors. Nutritional Benefits Mio Chunks provides essential nutrients including: Vitamins and minerals for coat health and muscle maintenance. Protein sourced mainly from beef, supporting lean body mass.
